---
name: USB Device Database Addition
about: Request that a USB radio interface or serial adapter be added to the known-device list
title: "[USB DEVICE] "
labels: usb-database, community
assignees: Computer-Tsu
---

## Device Information

| Field        | Value                        |
|-------------|------------------------------|
| Manufacturer |                              |
| Product Name |                              |
| VID (hex)    | e.g. `10C4`                  |
| PID (hex)    | e.g. `EA60`                  |

**How to find VID/PID:** Open Device Manager, right-click the device > Properties > Details > Hardware IDs.
The value looks like: `USB\VID_10C4&PID_EA60`

## Compatible Software
Check all that apply:
- [ ] FT8 (WSJT-X / JTDX)
- [ ] Winlink (RMS Express / Winlink Express)
- [ ] Fldigi
- [ ] JS8Call
- [ ] VARA HF
- [ ] VARA FM
- [ ] Direwolf
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional Notes
Any notes about driver requirements, quirks, or special configuration needed.
